_meta.description: REST API server configuration for Win11Forge
_meta.author: Julien Bombled

csrf.description: CSRF tokens required for POST/PUT/DELETE requests. Get token from /api/csrf-token endpoint.

security.notes: API requires authentication via X-API-Key header. CSRF protection and rate limiting are enabled by default.

apiKeys.description: API keys for authentication. Keys should be 32+ characters. Generate new keys using New-ApiKey cmdlet.
apiKeys.securityWarning: NEVER commit real API keys to version control. Use New-ApiKey to generate secure keys at runtime.

keys.description: Example key template - DISABLED by default. Use New-ApiKey to create secure keys.
